event_name: This is a DANCE party
description: Get up off the couch and hit the dance floor. Free your ass, free your mind, go home in time to be functional the next day. Whoever you are, however you dance this is the party for you! Join us at one of the coolest spaces downtown and get a mental break from all the chaos this winter brought. Our DJ's will be spinning only the best music that you can actually dance to. We will be sweating, laughing and generally losing ourselves on the dance floor. Get your ticket before 3/24 and get 40% off! Address and directions for getting to the space will be sent one week prior to the event. Follow on instagram @freetheassfreethemind. 3 hours 59 minutes ages 21+ In person Refund Policy Refunds up to 7 days before event.
source: Free the Ass Free the Mind

event_name: UNoutcasted dance lab
description: Using the contemplative arts and somatic embodiment, we will explore and scoop up any parts that have been outcasted on the dancefloor. This series (lab) is made for the shy one, the oddball, the loud one, the one who didn't always get invited to the thing, the one with chronic pain, the cool one, and the weird one. There will be a combination of solo, group, and partner practices.

event_name: The Soul Shakers Dance Party
description: Dance to the irresistible groove of The Soul Shakers! An upbeat night of classic soul, great music & dancing! The Soul Shakers are an in-demand band and undoubtedly one of the best dance bands on Vancouver Island! Top-notch musicianship, stellar harmonies and high energy performances are a trademark of this fine band led by powerhouse singer and entertainer Joyce 'the voice' Allensen. This band will have you singing and dancing along to classic popular Soul, Motown and R&B tunes as well as many other popular tunes. The Soul Shakers also feature music from their two independently released albums Love Is Love (2015) and Ready For You (2019). Get ready to feel the joy of a Soul Shakers performance! You won't leave the dance floors! The Upstairs Lounge is a licensed restaurant and bar, doors open at 6 pm for dinner service, the band starts playing at 7:30 pm.
location: Oak Bay Recreation - Personal Training/Active Rehab, 1975 Bee, Victoria, BC, CA
